title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
This week's SnP activity has primarily centered around large tankers and midsized bulk carriers,with various negotiations progressing across sectors and several transactions materializing. Dry Cargo vessels have continued to attract strong interest, as seen over recent weeks, supported by firm prices and limited availability. Dry Cargo
In the Ultramax segment, DOMINATOR (ABT 64K DWT, 2021, SHIN KASADO) is committed at USD 38m basis surveys promptly due in July 2026.
